id.description: The id of the Request Response.

created.description: The timestamp when the Request Response was created.

updated.description: The timestamp when the Request Response was last updated (will be updated when chat messages are received).

time_responded.description: The timestamp of when the RequestResponse was responded to.

time_expiry.description: The timestamp of when the RequestResponse expired or will expire.

time_refund_requested.description: The timestamp of when a refund request for the RequestResponse was claimed.

time_refunded.description: The timestamp of when the RequestResponse was refunded.

user_refund_requested.description: The label of the user that requested the refund.

monetary_account_id.description: The id of the MonetaryAccount the RequestResponse was received on.

amount_responded.description: The Amount the RequestResponse was accepted with.

status.description: The status of the RequestResponse. Can be ACCEPTED, PENDING, REJECTED, REFUND_REQUESTED, REFUNDED or REVOKED.

description.description: The description for the RequestResponse provided by the requesting party. Maximum 9000 characters.

alias.description: The LabelMonetaryAccount with the public information of the MonetaryAccount this RequestResponse was received on.

counterparty_alias.description: The LabelMonetaryAccount with the public information of the MonetaryAccount that is requesting money with this RequestResponse.

attachment.description: The Attachments attached to the RequestResponse.

minimum_age.description: The minimum age the user accepting the RequestResponse must have.

require_address.description: Whether or not an address must be provided on accept.

geolocation.description: The Geolocation where the RequestResponse was created.

type.description: The type of the RequestInquiry. Can be DIRECT_DEBIT, DIRECT_DEBIT_B2B, IDEAL, SOFORT or INTERNAL.

sub_type.description: The subtype of the RequestInquiry. Can be ONCE or RECURRING for DIRECT_DEBIT RequestInquiries and NONE for all other.

redirect_url.description: The URL which the user is sent to after accepting or rejecting the Request.

address_billing.description: The billing address provided by the accepting user if an address was requested.

address_shipping.description: The shipping address provided by the accepting user if an address was requested.

credit_scheme_identifier.description: The credit scheme id provided by the counterparty for DIRECT_DEBIT inquiries.

mandate_identifier.description: The mandate id provided by the counterparty for DIRECT_DEBIT inquiries.

eligible_whitelist_id.description: The whitelist id for this action or null.

request_reference_split_the_bill.description: The reference to the object used for split the bill. Can be RequestInquiry or RequestInquiryBatch

event_id.description: The ID of the latest event for the request.

monetary_account_preferred_id.description: The ID of the monetary account this user prefers to pay the request from.
